description: Nested-vendor canary: `packages/pkg-a/Templates1/foo.ts` places a `Templates1` vendor-directory at a non-root depth inside a monorepo-shaped layout. Post-v0.15.4 `Templates*` is any-depth matched (no leading slash = matches at any depth), so walkFiles must skip the nested vendor-dir as it recurses. Verifies any-depth-glob traversal behavior, distinct from root-only patterns like `/public`. jwt-detector must NOT emit.
